metadata.synopsis: The eternally cool William Marshall puts a fresh spin on the age-old legend of the vampire, condemned to wander the Earth with an insatiable lust for blood in "Blacula," often credited as the first African American horror film.
metadata.title: Blacula

metadata.synopsis: Brought back to the world of the living by a voodoo ceremony Blacula (William Marshall) is loosed with insatiable bloodlust upon the population of a small community in the Louisiana back country. Pam Grier also stars in this scintillating sequel
metadata.title: Scream, Blacula, Scream!

metadata.synopsis: Under cover of darkness, while an unsuspecting city sleeps, an alien life form begins to sow the seeds of unspeakable terror. Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Leonard Nimoy, Veronica Cartwright & Jeff Goldblum star in this classic suspense thriller.
metadata.title: Invasion Of The Body Snatchers

metadata.synopsis: 65 years after a serial killer terrorized the town of Texarkana, the so-called 'moonlight murders' begin again. Is it a copycat or something even more sinister? A lonely high school girl, with dark secrets of her own, may be the key to catching him.
metadata.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown (2014)

metadata.synopsis: Gather around the campfire....to die! After a cruel joke severely disfigures him, camp caretaker Cropsy is back -- with hedge clippers in hand -- seeking revenge on those who scarred him! Can the campers save themselves before he kills them all?
metadata.title: The Burning
